languages.text: {n}Звук сервомоторов черепа взлетает на два тона выше, когда он закладывает лихой вираж вокруг вашей головы. О результатах своего исследования Нунциус умалчивает.{/n}
{n}The pitch of the skull's servo-motors rises by two notes as it makes a sweeping bank around your head. Nuncius is silent on the results of his research.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Звук сервомоторов черепа взлетает на два тона выше, когда он закладывает лихой вираж вокруг вашей головы. О результатах своего исследования Нунциус умалчивает.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The pitch of the skull's servo-motors rises by two notes as it makes a sweeping bank around your head. Nuncius is silent on the results of his research.{/n}
{n}The pitch of the skull's servo-motors rises by two notes as it makes a sweeping bank around your head. Nuncius is silent on the results of his research.{/n}
{n}The pitch of the skull's servo-motors rises by two notes as it makes a sweeping bank around your head. Nuncius is silent on the results of his research.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El murmullo de los servomotores del cráneo aumenta de tonalidad mientras describe un círculo alrededor de tu cabeza. Nuncius no revela el resultado de su examen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pitch of the skull's servo-motors rises by two notes as it makes a sweeping bank around your head. Nuncius is silent on the results of his research.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El murmullo de los servomotores del cráneo aumenta de tonalidad mientras describe un círculo alrededor de tu cabeza. Nuncius no revela el resultado de su examen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}那头骨的伺服电机绕着你的脑袋盘旋了一圈，音调也随之升高了两个音阶。对于他的研究结果，努恩修斯保持着沉默。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pitch of the skull's servo-motors rises by two notes as it makes a sweeping bank around your head. Nuncius is silent on the results of his research.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}那头骨的伺服电机绕着你的脑袋盘旋了一圈，音调也随之升高了两个音阶。对于他的研究结果，努恩修斯保持着沉默。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le son des servomoteurs du crâne se fait plus aigu tandis qu'il tourne en s'inclinant autour de votre tête. Nuncius ne dit rien sur les résultats de ses recherches.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pitch of the skull's servo-motors rises by two notes as it makes a sweeping bank around your head. Nuncius is silent on the results of his research.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le son des servomoteurs du crâne se fait plus aigu tandis qu'il tourne en s'inclinant autour de votre tête. Nuncius ne dit rien sur les résultats de ses recherches.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kafatasının hizmotorlarının çıkardığı sesin perdesi, başının etrafında geniş bir dönüş yaparken iki nota yükseliyor. Nuncius, araştırmasının sonuçları konusunda suskunluğunu koruyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pitch of the skull's servo-motors rises by two notes as it makes a sweeping bank around your head. Nuncius is silent on the results of his research.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kafatasının hizmotorlarının çıkardığı sesin perdesi, başının etrafında geniş bir dönüş yaparken iki nota yükseliyor. Nuncius, araştırmasının sonuçları konusunda suskunluğunu koruyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}サーヴォスカルのサーボモーターの音程が二音上がり、あなたの頭の周りを大きく旋回した。ヌンキウスは自らの研究の成果について沈黙を保っている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pitch of the skull's servo-motors rises by two notes as it makes a sweeping bank around your head. Nuncius is silent on the results of his research.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}サーヴォスカルのサーボモーターの音程が二音上がり、あなたの頭の周りを大きく旋回した。ヌンキウスは自らの研究の成果について沈黙を保っている。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das Summen der Servomotoren des Schädels wird zwei Noten höher, als er um deinen Kopf fliegt. Nuncius schweigt zu den Ergebnissen seiner Forschung.{/n}
